extraction.one_line_summary: ALA PHILIPPE attacked on the final climb with ROGLIC, dropped QUINTANA on the punchy slopes, then outsprinted ROGLIC after a technical descent.
tactical_patterns: Quintana dropped on explosive final climb ramps despite Quick-Step/Lotto-Jumbo leadout confirms pure puncheur advantage over Alpine climbers.
Quick-Step committed Mas as backup to Ala Philippe revealing dual-card strategy despite solo breakaway partnership with Roglic.
Sky's Kwiatkowski/Gianni Moscon tempo on penultimate climb (22km out) failed to fragment peloton before decisive final ascent.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped immediately when Ala Philippe/Roglic accelerated on punchy final climb, confirming weakness on explosive terrain versus sustained Alpine efforts
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: matched Ala Philippe's decisive attack and descent, forced to lead out sprint, confirms stage racing punch
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: finished third as Ala Philippe's backup after dual Quick-Step card strategy paid dividends
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: chased on descent for French competition but couldn't close Ala Philippe/Roglic gap
